import json


def process_upload(file_content: bytes, user_id: str) -> dict:
    parsed = json.loads(file_content)
    enriched = enrich_data(parsed)
    validated = validate_schema(enriched)
    transformed = apply_transformations(validated)
    
    if not user_id:
        raise ValueError("user_id is required")
    
    return save_to_database(transformed)


def generate_report(template_id: str, data: dict, format: str) -> bytes:
    template = load_template(template_id)
    rendered = render(template, data)
    
    if format not in ("pdf", "html", "csv"):
        raise ValueError(f"Unsupported format: {format}")
    
    return export(rendered, format)


def train_model(dataset_path: str, config: dict) -> dict:
    data = load_dataset(dataset_path)
    preprocessed = preprocess(data)
    model = build_model(config)
    trained = model.train(preprocessed)
    
    if not config.get("model_name"):
        raise ValueError("model_name is required")
    
    return save_model(trained, config["model_name"])
